title: XP Bank
description: Now you can store the exp in bottles!
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png)

The "**XP Bank**" Data Pack / Mod allows players to store their **experience points** in glass bottles, turning them into convenient experience bottles for future use. Here’s how it works:

![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png)

**Experience Conversion**: Players can store their experience points by shifing on an enchanting table while holding glass bottles. One experience level is deducted per bottle filled.

**Using the Experience Bottles**: Once filled, the bottles can be stored and used anytime to regain the stored experience, just like a regular experience bottle. Simply right-click to get the experience points back.

**Limitations and Balance**: To prevent abuse, the datapack may limit the amount of experience that can be stored, requiring a minimum of one level per bottle.

This datapack is ideal for players who want to optimize their use of experience points, preventing the loss of precious levels in case of death.
